screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows a transmitting antenna whose electron oscillates, radiating an electromagnetic wave toward a receiving antenna. The field is visualized between them, with oscilloscope plots of each electron's motion.
screenSummary.controlArea: The controls move the transmitter electron manually or oscillate it at a chosen frequency and amplitude, select the field display mode and what the field represents, show the electron-position plots, and play or pause the simulation. A Reset All button returns the simulation to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Oscillate the transmitter electron and watch the electromagnetic wave travel to the receiving antenna.

a11y.currentDetails: The transmitter is set to frequency {{frequency}} and amplitude {{amplitude}}.

controls.transmitterElectronHelp: Drag up or down to move the transmitting electron by hand.
